raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2367 aims to raise awareness of the invaluable work of state special schools by allowing highway signs to be built for these schools.",
    "CSD is the sole bilingual school that offers education in American Sign Language and English in the region.",
    "Students at the California School for the Deaf-Fremont presented a bill proposal to install freeway signage directing people to the school.",
    "The students from CSD hope that more families will be aware of the educational, linguistic, and social opportunities available at the schools.",
    "By increasing visibility of their students, AB 2367 aims to strengthen the connections between state special schools and the broader community."
  ]
}
